narrative:
Cloverleaf Local Sd (Medina) school district has 14,835 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
